zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Drew於1665年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德達勒姆奧易斯特 利維時，他的父親William Drew38歲，母親Elizabeth Matthews42歲。他於1683年9月與Mary Bunker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1734年2月22日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Drew于1665年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德達勒姆奧易斯特 利維时，他的父亲William Drew38岁，母亲Elizabeth Matthews42岁。他于1683年9月与Mary Bunker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1734年2月22日之后。

nameMeanings.name: Drew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from a Norman French personal name Dreus based on ancient Germanic Drogo, the name of one of the sons of Charlemagne (compare Gothic driugan ‘to serve as a soldier’). In Old French this name became Dreus, Drues (nominative) and Dru, Driu, Dreu (accusative) and was introduced to England by the Normans. For further information about this name, see also Montague .
English: from the personal name Drew, a pet form of Andrew which was confused with the same name of Old French origin (see 1 above).

Irish: when not an adoption of the English surname, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Druaidh or Ó Druaidh or Ó Draoi ‘son’ and ‘descendant of the druid’, from draoi ‘druid’, genitive druadh or draoi. All of these were often Anglicized as Drury .

variants.name: Drews
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhard, Gunter, Hans, Heinz, Helmut, Otto, Reinhold, Bernd, Detlef, Egon, Erna.
English: variant of Drew with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also found in Guernsey in the Channel Islands.
Americanized form of German, Danish, and Dutch   Drewes  .

variants.name: Drewer
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Droart, Drouart (which is probably from ancient Germanic Droghard, with the first element as in Drew + hard ‘brave, hardy’).

variants.name: Drewett
meanings: English (Wiltshire, Berkshire, and Surrey): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Druet, a diminutive of Drue, Dreu (from ancient Germanic Drogo); see Drew 1. Alternatively, the name may be from a diminutive of Old French dru ‘lover’; see Drew 4.

variants.name: Dronet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Desire, Olympe.

French (mainly Loire-Atlantique): from a diminutive of the personal name Dron, derived from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ).

variants.name: Droz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Aida, Cruz Maria, Diego, Jose, Miguel, Milagros, Nydia, Osvaldo, Rodriguez, Vidal.

French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). This surname is also found in Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Drea
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny): shortened Anglicized form of Ó Draoi (see Drew ).

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: Drouin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Benoit, Jacques, Andre, Clermont, Emile, Gaston, Gilles, Ovide, Pierre, Serge.

French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Droue, a variant of Dreue, which is from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). Compare Derouen , Derouin , and Tron .

variants.name: Drury
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Drury  .

variants.name: Drouhard
meanings: French:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Droghard, composed of the elements drog (presumably meaning ‘battle’; see also Drew ) and hard ‘hard, strong’.
alternatively, a derivative of the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names like Droghard (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Drew was born in 1665, in Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, his father, William Drew, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth Matthews, was 42. He married Mary Bunker in September 1683, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died after 22 February 1734.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Drew è nato il nel 1665 nel Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William Drew, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Matthews, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Mary Bunker nel settembre 1683, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì dopo il 22 febbraio 1734.

ja.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバー

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Drewが1665年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードダルハムオイスター リバーで生まれた時，父William Drewは38歳，母Elizabeth Matthewsは42歳であった。1683年9月にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーでMary Bunkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1734年2月22日以後に死去した。

ko.Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Ham: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 뒤람 이스터 라이버
ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버

ko.Oyster River Parish, Strafford, New Hamp: 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 스트래퍼드 이스터 라이버 파리시
ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Drew(이)가 1665년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 뒤람 이스터 라이버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Drew(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Matthews(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1683년 9월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 Mary Bunker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1734년 2월 22일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Drew nasceu em 1665, em Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Drew, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Matthews, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Bunker em setembro de 1683, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu após 22 de fevereiro de 1734.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Drew родился в 1665 г. в местности оистир ривир, дурам, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Drew было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Matthews, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Bunker сентябрь 1683 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер после 22 февраль 1734 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Drew nació en 1665, en Oyster River, Durham, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, William Drew, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Matthews, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Mary Bunker en septiembre de 1683, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió después de 22 de febrero de 1734.
